work_orders.requirement: Classify every tracked exact-head component and determine duplicate ownership before adding an orchestrator or specialist runtime.
work_orders.change_boundary: Read-only repository and artifact inspection; no production, test, tool or workflow changes.
work_orders.test: Complete-path token classification plus exact-head inspection of M9, M1, M7, M8, Red Team, worker and dispatcher ownership.
work_orders.pass_criteria: All 682 tracked paths classified; existing overlapping components assigned reuse/extend ownership; no unexamined equivalent manager or specialist path.
work_orders.rollback_condition: Any missed tracked equivalent component or wrong exact-head binding reopens the gate.
work_orders.residual_risk: Untracked local files and external systems are outside repository-tree scope.

work_orders.requirement: Obtain a complete recursive tree for the frozen exact head through a full repository checkout.
work_orders.change_boundary: Temporary change only to tools/m1_baseline_audit.py; mandatory restoration to original blob after artifact capture.
work_orders.test: Linux and Windows full-depth checkout; git ls-tree -r --full-tree --long -z HEAD^; compare entry arrays and hashes; verify rollback tree equality.
work_orders.pass_criteria: Both platforms bind the same parent head and produce identical complete entry arrays; temporary patch leaves zero resulting tree change.
work_orders.rollback_condition: Target mismatch, platform disagreement, truncation or original-tool blob mismatch.
work_orders.residual_risk: Evidence is static and does not execute the future manager-specialist runtime.

work_orders.requirement: Persist the recursive-tree identity and duplicate-risk decision as immutable GitHub evidence.
work_orders.test: Bind five fragment Git blobs, committed index, artifact digests, entry counts and fail-closed claim boundary.
work_orders.pass_criteria: Permanent artifacts bind exact head, dual-platform source evidence and duplicate decisions without release or runtime claim.
work_orders.rollback_condition: Malformed index, wrong target, missing fragment or claim elevation.
work_orders.residual_risk: Text reader truncates complete reread of long parts 001 and 002; primary completeness remains independently established by dual-platform Actions artifacts.

work_orders.requirement: Reconcile control state after the recursive inventory and duplicate-risk gate.
work_orders.change_boundary: Existing M0 evidence files and PR metadata only.
work_orders.test: Remove only the inventory blocker; preserve runtime and L4/L5 blockers; enforce no-parallel migration rules.
work_orders.pass_criteria: State records inventory and duplicate risk as resolved L0 while controller runtime, L2 ingestion, L4/L5, RUN A/RUN B and physical pilot remain open.
work_orders.rollback_condition: Any false milestone/release completion or parallel-component authorization.
work_orders.residual_risk: PR metadata remains to be bound to the final evidence head.
